criteriaResults.description: A LICENSE file exists at the repository root containing a valid MIT license text with a copyright year.
criteriaResults.evidence: LICENSE file exists at /Users/claude/dev/platform-game/LICENSE. Contains standard MIT License text verbatim (21 lines). Copyright line reads 'Copyright (c) 2025 Kingdoms of the Canvas Contributors' with year 2025.

criteriaResults.description: The README.md LICENSE link correctly resolves to the LICENSE file and the license section describes MIT.
criteriaResults.evidence: README.md line 176 contains 'This project is licensed under the MIT License. See [LICENSE](LICENSE) for details.' The link target 'LICENSE' matches the existing LICENSE file at the repository root. License section accurately describes MIT.

criteriaResults.description: README.md includes appropriate badges near the top - license badge showing MIT plus at least 2 other relevant badges.
criteriaResults.evidence: README.md lines 3-6 contain 4 shields.io badges immediately after the title: (1) License: MIT (blue), (2) Vanilla JavaScript (yellow), (3) Dependencies: None (brightgreen), (4) HTML5 Canvas (orange). All use standard img.shields.io format. License badge present plus 3 other relevant badges exceeds the 2-badge minimum.

criteriaResults.description: The game still loads and runs without errors after changes.
criteriaResults.evidence: Started python3 HTTP server on port 8080. Playwright (headless Chromium) loaded http://localhost:8080 successfully. Canvas element found with expected 960x540 dimensions. No JavaScript console errors or page errors detected after 2-second observation window.

holistic.notes: This is a fix sprint adding LICENSE and badges only. No design or originality changes -- scores carried forward from sprint-12 baseline.

summary: Fix sprint fix-001 adds a valid MIT LICENSE file and 4 shields.io badges to README.md. All 4 criteria pass: LICENSE file exists with standard MIT text and copyright year, README link resolves correctly and mentions MIT, badges are present near the top in standard format (1 license + 3 others), and the game loads and runs without errors. No regressions detected.
